market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
articles.description: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

articles.title: Microsoft patches bug in video game Age of Empires II
articles.description: The vulnerability in the decades-old game could have allowed hackers to take over victims’ computers with a malicious game invite.

articles.title: Apple bans home services from its upcoming Maps ads
articles.description: Apple has published the policies governing its upcoming Maps advertising business, revealing a strategy that differs from Google’s. The new rules prohibit home services businesses like plumbers, electricians, locksmiths, and roofers from advertising on Apple Maps, along with several other sensitive

articles.title: SpaceX slips below its $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
articles.description: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

articles.title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
articles.description: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

articles.title: US Senator blasts AG pick for ‘dismantling’ crypto unit, Trump’s CZ pardon
articles.description: President Donald Trump’s pick for US Attorney General faced criticism from members of the Senate Judiciary Committee on his approach to crypto enforcement and the pardon of former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao.

articles.title: Google’s biggest clean power project is 40 miles north of xAI’s unpermitted gas power plant
articles.description: Google's biggest solar and battery project stands in sharp contrast with xAI's nearby unpermitted power plant.

articles.title: Ostium pauses trading as security firms report multimillion-dollar oracle exploit
articles.description: Ostium halted trading and advised revoking contract approvals after blockchain security firms reported an apparent oracle-related exploit of its OLP liquidity vault, with estimated losses ranging from $18 million to $22 million.

articles.title: DTCC moves tokenized securities into live trading, marking a milestone for Wall Street's blockchain push
articles.description: DTCC's first live production trades using tokenized securities show how blockchain could reshape the infrastructure behind Wall Street.

articles.title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
articles.description: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.

articles.title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
articles.description: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.

articles.title: Cantor and Securitize collaborate on blockchain-based IPOs
articles.description: The move creates a pathway for public companies to raise capital onchain and issue tokenized securities.

articles.title: Aave launches V4 on Avalanche, laying groundwork for tokenized credit markets
articles.description: The deployment marks Aave V4’s first expansion beyond Ethereum and introduces lending infrastructure designed to support future markets for tokenized real-world assets.

articles.title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
articles.description: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

articles.title: 既怕依賴又怕落後，德勤調查揭家長對孩子用 AI 的矛盾心情
articles.description: 人工智慧工具快速進入校園，家長對孩子使用 AI 的態度也呈一體兩面的矛盾。德勤（Deloitte）年度返校調查 […]

articles.title: NASA 前署長轟阿提米絲登月計畫「過度複雜」，登陸器難產成致命傷
articles.description: 美國國家航空暨太空總署（NASA）前局長吉姆·布萊登斯坦（Jim Bridenstine）近日拋出震撼彈，直指 […]

articles.title: Securitize, Cantor target tokenized IPOs for public markets
articles.description: Securitize and Cantor Fitzgerald are developing infrastructure for tokenized IPOs and secondary equity offerings within the existing US securities framework.

articles.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
articles.description: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

articles.title: Ostium suffers $18 million exploit as oracle attack wave continues to hit DeFi
articles.description: A hacker used Ostium's own price-reporting infrastructure against the protocol, submitting falsified future-dated oracle data to manufacture fake trading profits and trigger an $18 million payout.

articles.title: Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
articles.description: Can a handful of engineers really do the work of an army of consultants? That’s the bet behind Ode with Anthropic — the joint venture dedicated to embedding forward-deployed engineers in enterprise firms, backed by Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs
